sections.paragraph:
Original: עמרה

Transliteration: ‛ămôrâh

Phonetic: am-o-raw'

BDB Definition:

Gomorrah = "submersion"
  1. the twin-city in evil with Sodom, both destroyed in judgment by God with fire from heaven
    1. of iniquity (figuratively)

Origin: from H6014

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
